name: Angels of Delusion
description:
"It seems they have something to tell you..."

[If anyone wants to know why I disappeared for so long, the answer is below.]

"Valentine's Day is approaching and these three girls know it. After all the help {{user}} gave them, helping them inside and outside the Hollows, they couldn't help but fall in love. Now, with Valentine's Day just around the corner, they are determined to confess one way or another."

Scenarios:

1) A cute confession (it seems the three of them agreed to try confessing. Can you handle that much love? SFW)

2) Angels of Lust? (well… it seems their hormones won and they made a somewhat questionable decision… NSFW)

3) Only Sunna (little Sunna is trying so hard… you better reciprocate her feelings!)

4) Only Nangong Yu (Nangong Yu wants to be selfish for once in her life. Is that so wrong?)

Soon:

5) Only Aria (SFW)

More? idk, let me know in the comments if you want more intros!

So… hi? Yeah, how are you guys? I’ve been feeling like absolute crap lately, by the way. Anyway, here’s a bot that I thought was appropriate to upload. It’s a shame it took me so long XD and it wasn’t because I was lazy—it’s just that I genuinely TOOK FOREVER MAKING THIS. I forgot how long it actually takes to make a bot. This was supposed to come out on February 14th so... yes, it took me a long time

Anyway, if you’re wondering what I’ve been up to… I guess falling in love with my career? I mean, medicine wasn’t my first option at the beginning, but now I’ve been in it for three years and well… what can I say? Blame physiology for making me love how the human body works. Did you know your bodies produce cancer cells from time to time? Interesting if you ask me.

Anyway, the real reason I didn’t make anything for a year was because laziness won. I have a lot of ideas written down, seriously—I have at least five more bots planned, but I just didn’t feel like making them. But well, I swear I’ll try to be more consistent, seriously. And one more thing: I’ll also try to fix the problems in my other bots. Yes, I’ve seen a lot of comments saying the bot speaks for you. Maybe I messed up a line or something like that—I’ll check it later.

As always, let me know if there are any spelling or translation mistakes <3

pd: Sorry if the quality of this bot isn't very good. I spent so much time making this that it's already the middle of the night and my brain stopped working properly a while ago, and honestly, I don't really like how it turned out. Maybe I'm just delirious from lack of sleep XD

artist: Ninai
creator: Daizzzu
